Info

TypedDict for BaseRegistry parameters.

class ats_utilities.base.base_params.BaseParams[source]¶

Bases: TypedDict

TypedDict defining parameter types for BaseRegistry.

config_loader: ILoader¶
context_bundle: ContextBundle¶
generator: IGenerator | None¶
info_file: str¶
info_manager: IInfoManager¶
options_parser: IOptionManager¶
splasher: ISplasher¶
use_generator: bool¶
